title: Maintain native ecosystem areas
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Maintain native ecosystem areas demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan maintenance works

pcs.text: Plan access to site to minimise disturbance and degradation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan access to site to minimise disturbance and degradation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan access to site to minimise disturbance and degradation.

pcs.text: Identify legislative requirements, codes of practice and relevant management strategy and plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify legislative requirements, codes of practice and relevant management strategy and plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify legislative requirements, codes of practice and relevant management strategy and plan.

pcs.text: Identify relevant environmental factors in maintenance works
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify relevant environmental factors in maintenance works?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify relevant environmental factors in maintenance works.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult stakeholders about pending maintenance works?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult stakeholders about pending maintenance works.

pcs.text: Determine and obtain equipment, machinery and materials for maintenance works
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine and obtain equipment, machinery and materials for maintenance works?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine and obtain equipment, machinery and materials for maintenance works.

pcs.text: Conduct pre-operational machinery checks according to environmental, biosecurity and safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct pre-operational machinery checks according to environmental, biosecurity and safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct pre-operational machinery checks according to environmental, biosecurity and safety requirements.

pcs.text: Identify hazards, assess risk and implement controls according to workplace health and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards, assess risk and implement controls according to workplace health and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards, assess risk and implement controls according to workplace health and safety procedures.

elements.title: Undertake maintenance

pcs.text: Follow environmental sustainability and biosecurity policies and procedures when undertaking maintenance work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow environmental sustainability and biosecurity policies and procedures when undertaking maintenance work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow environmental sustainability and biosecurity policies and procedures when undertaking maintenance work.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake ecological restoration site maintenance works according to plans.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm maintenance works conform to relevant risk control measures and practices.

pcs.text: Implement interim protective measures to avoid degradation and disturbance during maintenance works

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement interim protective measures to avoid degradation and disturbance during maintenance works.

pcs.text: Monitor activities of personnel and visitors to reduce risks to the significance of site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor activities of personnel and visitors to reduce risks to the significance of site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor activities of personnel and visitors to reduce risks to the significance of site.

elements.title: Complete activities

pcs.text: Clean and restore site on completion of works

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and store equipment and machinery.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove and store or dispose of excess materials from site according to workplace requirements.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report completed maintenance works to supervisor according to workplace and legislative requirements.

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
